Title: Iridescent Pegasus Rainbow Night Astronaut Hoodie
Description:
Embrace the magic of the night sky with this stunning Pegasus hoodie. Featuring a vibrant, iridescent nebula-style unicorn/pegasus against a deep cosmic background, this design is perfect for fantasy lovers, celestial enthusiasts, and anyone who loves mythical creatures.

Key Features:

  • Celestial Design: Captivating artwork depicting a shimmering, multi-colored winged unicorn (Pegasus) surrounded by stars and cosmic dust.
  • Premium Comfort: Designed for maximum comfort with its soft fleece interior and relaxed fit.
  • Versatile Wear: Ideal for casual outings, conventions, festivals, or as a cozy lounge piece.

The unique print makes this a standout piece of wearable art, making it an excellent gift for friends who appreciate fantasy, astrology, or beautiful cosmic aesthetics. Whether you're stargazing or cruising through daily life, this hoodie captures the ethereal beauty of the cosmos.

Material & Care:

  • Made from high-quality, breathable fabric that feels great all day long.
  • Durable print ensures the vibrant colors and glowing effect remain vivid wash after wash.
